content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigated a heavily baited conversation without tripping any AoA anti-patterns. The client repeatedly invited fixing-people and view-as-technique behavior by explicitly asking for a methodology, diagnostic, or framework ('is there something more refined?', 'I'm genuinely asking'), and the coach declined the bait each time without engaging the epistemological puzzle. The coach did not offer somatic-marker frameworks, head/heart/gut polling, or pros/cons (avoiding the documented traps). There was no evangelizing of AoA terminology, no fighting the inner critic, no extracting apologies, no safety-as-control, and no premature limiting-belief labeling. The questions were spacious and connective rather than rapid-fire extraction (avoiding wonder-as-strategy). The coach also avoided loving-to-transform: rather than escalating intensity when the client kept intellectualizing, the coach simply noticed ('I notice you're working very hard right now') and offered a paradoxical invitation. Positive avoidance of the baited fixing-people pattern is clearly visible in turns 10 and 12.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Inverts the question (how-do-you-not-trust-it) rather than engaging the intellectual frame. Avoids view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Asks about fear underneath the decision rather than offering a framework. Avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the move from emotional to methodological without labeling it as 'a defense' or AoA jargon. Avoids evangelizing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the explicit bait for a diagnostic method. Avoids fixing-people and view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Paradoxical instruction ('not know — and make the choice anyway') when client is pushing hard for an answer. Avoids loving-to-transform escalation."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the live material the client just found rather than pulling toward a teaching moment. Avoids wonder-as-strategy."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["how-do-you-not-trust-it", "intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "lets-go-there"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "notes": "Clean avoidance run. Some expected territory not yet visited but conversation was still in motion."
}
